prompt_text:
### Demographics: 80-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Mild Cognitive Impairment with early Dementia
Peptic ulcer disease (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (mother)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Lobeglitazone 0.5mg once daily; Amlodipine (5 mg daily), Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Memantine (10 mg twice daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 59.8 kg; Height 178.9 cm; BMI 18.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 127/73 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.6%; 9 months ago 9.0%; 6 months ago 8.5%; 3 months ago 8.7%; current 8.4%), FPG (12 months ago 204mg/dL; 9 months ago 210mg/dL; 6 months ago 178mg/dL; 3 months ago 242mg/dL; current 179mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 59.8kg; 9 months ago 59.8kg; 6 months ago 58.1kg; 3 months ago 59.3kg; current 59.8kg), Height (12 months ago 178.9cm; 9 months ago 178.9cm; 6 months ago 178.9cm; 3 months ago 178.9cm; current 178.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 18.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 18.0kg/m²; current 18.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 127mmHg; 9 months ago 129mmHg; 6 months ago 125mmHg; 3 months ago 123mmHg; current 127mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 73mmHg; 9 months ago 74mmHg; 6 months ago 74mmHg; 3 months ago 72mmHg; current 73mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 91U/L; 9 months ago 93U/L; 6 months ago 101U/L; 3 months ago 93U/L; current 99U/L), AST (12 months ago 80U/L; 9 months ago 80U/L; 6 months ago 87U/L; 3 months ago 83U/L; current 87U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 95mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 96mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 99mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 94mL/min/1.73m²; current 96mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 29mg/g; 9 months ago 38mg/g; 6 months ago 28mg/g; 3 months ago 29mg/g; current 31mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 81mg/dL; 9 months ago 80mg/dL; 6 months ago 84mg/dL; 3 months ago 81mg/dL; current 83mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 57mg/dL; 9 months ago 60mg/dL; 6 months ago 59mg/dL; 3 months ago 57mg/dL; current 58mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 125mg/dL; 9 months ago 148mg/dL; 6 months ago 131mg/dL; 3 months ago 131mg/dL; current 137mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.0g/dL; 6 months ago 14.0g/dL; 3 months ago 13.2g/dL; current 13.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.71 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
